location.description: PostgreSQL connection URI: postgres://[user[:password]@]host[:port][/database]. If a database path is included, only that database is backed up; otherwise all databases are backed up.

host.description: PostgreSQL server hostname (default: localhost). Overrides the host in the location URI.

port.description: PostgreSQL server port (default: 5432). Overrides the port in the location URI.

username.description: PostgreSQL username. Overrides the username in the location URI.

password.description: PostgreSQL password. Overrides the password in the location URI.

database.description: Name of the database to back up. If omitted, all connectable databases are backed up individually. Overrides the database in the location URI.

exclude_databases.description: Comma-separated list of database names to skip during a full backup. Has no effect when a single database is selected via the database parameter or URI path. Example: rdsadmin,template1.

schema_only.description: When enabled, passes -s to pg_dump to dump only schema (no data). Mutually exclusive with data_only.

data_only.description: When enabled, passes -a to pg_dump to dump only data (no schema). Mutually exclusive with schema_only.

pg_bin_dir.description: Directory containing the PostgreSQL client binaries (pg_dump, pg_dumpall, psql). When omitted, binaries are resolved via $PATH.

compress.description: Enable pg_dump compression. By default dumps are uncompressed so that Plakar's own compression is not degraded.

ssl_mode.description: SSL mode for the connection, passed via PGSSLMODE.

ssl_cert.description: Path to the client SSL certificate file (PEM format), passed via PGSSLCERT. Mutually exclusive with ssl_cert_data.

ssl_cert_data.description: Inline PEM content of the client SSL certificate. Written to a temporary file at runtime. Mutually exclusive with ssl_cert.

ssl_key.description: Path to the client SSL private key file (PEM format), passed via PGSSLKEY. Mutually exclusive with ssl_key_data.

ssl_key_data.description: Inline PEM content of the client SSL private key. Written to a temporary file at runtime. Mutually exclusive with ssl_key.

ssl_root_cert.description: Path to the root CA certificate used to verify the server (PEM format), passed via PGSSLROOTCERT. Mutually exclusive with ssl_root_cert_data.

ssl_root_cert_data.description: Inline PEM content of the root CA certificate. Written to a temporary file at runtime. Mutually exclusive with ssl_root_cert.
